title: Nizam Feature List Schema
description: Validates .agent/feature_list.json, the DAG-validated, acceptance-test-bearing feature breakdown of a phase, produced by the planner and consumed by the generator/validator/evaluator loop.

phase.description: Id of the phase this feature list belongs to.

spec_version.description: Version of the product_spec.md this feature list was derived from.

original_estimate_lines.description: Total estimated lines of change across every feature in the phase, used by the Scope Budget Protocol.

features.description: Every feature in the phase, in dependency order.

id.description: Unique feature identifier within the phase, e.g. '001'.

description.description: What the feature delivers and why.

status.description: Current lifecycle state of the feature.

dependencies.description: Ids of features that must be 'complete' or 'cancelled' before this feature may begin.

acceptance_tests.description: Human-readable acceptance criteria this feature must satisfy.

estimated_lines.description: Estimated lines of change for this feature.
